name: feature-explainer
description: Standalone HTML feature explainer for research/learning output: a sticky on-this-page nav, an overview TL;DR, prose sections (heading + body), and labeled code blocks. Zero-JS: the reference's tabbed code is rendered as stacked labeled blocks.

slots.description: Feature topic; used in <title> and the h1.
Small overline label, e.g. area or repo.
Short summary of what the feature does and how it flows.
Prose sections; one heading + body block each (also seeds nav anchors).
Code block caption, e.g. a file path or label.
Footer provenance line, auto-filled by the agent.
